message:
refactor(net,service,web): improve buffer management, network transport, and web handler error paths

- Refine service buffer with improved capacity management and
  backpressure handling
- Simplify network module, QUIC transport, and TCP stream error paths
- Improve web health and session handler error reporting
- FrankenLab main minor adjustments
- Database pool minor refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
